name: microKorg verified v2
source: Cross-reference: gosub/microkorg-erl (program_decode.erl + program_encode.erl + enums.erl) + eclab/edisyn (KorgMicroKorg.java + KorgMicroKorgVocoder.java). Korg official MIDI Implementation PDF was unreachable from this environment, so PDF citations are absent; all entries reflect erl/edisyn agreement unless noted. | v2 gap-fill (vocoder ch level/pan paired bytes 85..115, OSC1 pad bytes 49/157, reserved tail 198..253)

params.label: Arp trigger pattern length (steps)
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree (stored 0-7 = length 1-8; erl decode does Len+1)

params.label: Arp trigger pattern (8 step bitmap)
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. Each bit i (0..7) = step i on/off.

params.label: Voice mode
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. erl: 0=single,2=double,3=vocoder. edisyn collapses anything>=2 to Layer. Value 1 is undocumented/unused.

params.label: Scale key
params.notes: erl only (edisyn pins byte 17 to 0, ignoring scale)

params.label: Scale type
params.notes: erl only. Raw 0-N enum; values not enumerated in erl source (passthrough).

params.label: Split point (note number)
params.notes: edisyn pins to 60 (middle C); erl treats as opaque byte. Likely split-point for Split mode.

params.label: EQ high gain (dB)
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. Raw byte = gain+64.

params.label: EQ low gain (dB)
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. Raw byte = gain+64.

params.label: Arpeggio tempo (BPM)
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. Big-endian u16 across bytes 30-31.

params.label: Arpeggio type
params.notes: erl: low nibble. edisyn uses (byte & 7); both compatible for documented 0-5 values.

params.label: Arpeggio range (octaves)
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. erl: range = stored+1 (0-3 → 1-4 octaves). edisyn raw 0-3.

params.label: Keyboard octave
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree (signed byte; erl: KbdOctave)

params.label: Timbre 1 key priority
params.notes: erl only — edisyn doesn't read/write this field. erl: 0=last.

params.label: Timbre 1 OSC1 DWGS waveform
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. erl: dwgs = stored+1 (1-64).

params.label: Timbre 1 filter velocity sense
params.notes: erl only — edisyn writes constant 64 (0). erl: Raw = value+64.

params.label: Timbre 1 amp switch (EG2-controlled)
params.notes: erl only — edisyn doesn't expose this bit. erl: bit 6 of byte amp+2.

params.label: Timbre 1 amp velocity sense
params.notes: erl only — edisyn writes constant 64 (0). Raw = value+64.

params.label: Timbre 1 LFO1 waveform
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. LFO1's third value is Triangle (LFO2's is Sine).

params.label: Timbre 1 LFO1 sync note
params.notes: erl uses 5-bit width, edisyn comments doc says bits 0-4 but mask 0xF; both consistent since only 15 values exist.

params.label: Timbre 1 LFO2 waveform
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. LFO2's third value is Sine (vs Triangle on LFO1).

params.label: Timbre 1 patch 1 destination
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree (only 0-7 used; edisyn comments doc disagrees but the 3-bit values fit)

params.label: Timbre 2 MIDI channel
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. Timbre 2 starts at offset 38+108=146. -1=global. Only used in Layer mode.

params.label: Timbre 2 key priority
params.notes: erl only — edisyn doesn't expose this field.

params.label: Vocoder MIDI channel
params.notes: Voice mode = Vocoder: 142-byte block replaces the 2 timbres starting at offset 38. -1=global. erl + edisyn agree.

params.label: Vocoder filter EG1 reset
params.notes: erl only — edisyn doesn't expose for vocoder.

params.label: Audio In 1 HPF gate
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree (bit 0 of byte at offset 50)

params.label: Vocoder portamento time
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. erl decodes at byte (38+14)=52; edisyn at (38+14)=52.

params.label: Vocoder mixer external 1 level
params.notes: erl: ext1_lvl (Mixer field 2). edisyn: 'osc2level' but writes same offset. erl + edisyn agree on offset.

params.label: Vocoder filter mod source
params.notes: erl: 1-7 mapped (no 0); edisyn array has 'Off' at index 0. erl + edisyn agree on offset.

params.label: Vocoder EG1 (filter) sustain
params.notes: edisyn only — erl writes zeros across EG1 block for vocoder. Edisyn parses this single byte.

params.label: Vocoder channel 1 level
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. Note: edisyn writes pair (offset+46, offset+47) = same byte; only 8 channels stored. Bytes 84-99 = 8 pairs.

params.label: Vocoder channel 1 pan
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. Pan bytes 100-115 = 8 pairs of pan (raw=val+64).

params.label: Vocoder channel 1 hold level
params.notes: erl + edisyn agree. 16 channels × 4 bytes big-endian, starting at byte 38+78=116. Hold level for each band.

params.label: Timbre 1 OSC1 pad byte
params.notes: reserved per erl (osc1 trailing _:8) + edisyn (data[offset+11] = 0); preserve original value

params.label: Vocoder Ch4 Level (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 90. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch5 Level (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 92. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch6 Level (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 94. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch7 Level (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 96. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch8 Level (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 98. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch1 Pan (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 100 per edisyn (warns if +62 != +63). mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch2 Pan (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 102. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch3 Pan (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 104. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch4 Pan (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 106. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch5 Pan (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 108. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch6 Pan (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 110. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch7 Pan (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 112. mirror on write.

params.label: Vocoder Ch8 Pan (paired high byte)
params.notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 114. mirror on write.

params.label: Reserved tail byte 198
params.notes: reserved per erl + edisyn. In single/double mode this is inside timbre2 trailing pad. In vocoder mode this falls inside the 74-byte trailing pad after the 142-byte vocoder block. Preserve original value.

params.label: Reserved tail byte 199
params.notes: reserved per erl + edisyn; preserve original value

params.notes: reserved per erl + edisyn; preserve original value

params.notes: reserved per erl + edisyn; preserve original value
